Team

The people behind Seven

DJ
Founder & CEO

Danilo Jesus

Languages: Portuguese, Spanish

«Bring me the problem, and I’ll bring the solution.» Fast and determined, he has one goal: that the client gets what they came for.

AK

Ana Kathlyn

Lawyer

Languages: Portuguese, English

A strong sense of justice and great empathy. She makes sure every case stands on solid legal ground.

GR

Gabriela Ramos

Process Coordinator

Languages: Portuguese, English, Spanish

The right hand of the operation. Smart, fast and attentive — many of our cases pass through her hands.

DS

Dayane Silva

Process Coordinator · Faro location

Languages: Portuguese

An accountant by training, kindness in person. She looks after those who arrive in Faro with the care of someone who handles people, not papers.

We serve in Portuguese, English and Spanish — in whichever language you feel most comfortable.

We turn bureaucracy into solutions.

Administrative, legal, tax and immigration advisory in Portugal.

SANTOS JESUS Unipessoal Lda · NIPC 518 146 529
